articles.title: Live updates: Iran warns American forces in Strait of Hormuz will be attacked if US guides ships - CNN
articles.description: An Iranian official warned American forces will be attacked if they try to approach or enter the oil chokepoint, after President Donald Trump said the US military will begin guiding stranded ships through the strait today. Follow for live updates.
articles.content:
Shipping executives are expressing caution over Project Freedom, the US operation starting Monday to guide trapped neutral ships through the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: What to know about the US military presence in Europe as Trump seeks drawdown of thousands of troops - AP News
articles.description: U.S. President Donald Trump’s pledge to shrink America’s military deployment in Germany is putting a new spotlight on the U.S. military presence in Europe. He said the U.S. would go “a lot further” than a reduction of 5,000 troops announced by the Defense Dep…
articles.content:
WASHINGTON (AP) President Donald Trumps vow to shrink Americas military deployment in Germany has put a new spotlight on the U.S. role in Europe.
